name: Write Lattice Data
description: Writes a value to a writable lattice path: w/ (workspace), o/ (operation pins), n/ (agent scope, when running inside an agent), or t/ (job temp, when running inside a job). Other namespaces are managed via dedicated APIs (g/ via agent_*, s/ via secret_*, j/ via job APIs). Path is '/'-separated; intermediate maps are created on demand. Writing null deletes the entry. To pin an operation by name for grid_run, write its full metadata to o/<name>: see system prompt. Returns {written: true}.

path.description: Writable lattice path. Must start with one of: 'w/' (workspace), 'o/' (operation pins), 'n/' (agent scope), 't/' (job temp). Deep paths create intermediate maps.

value.description: The value to store. Use structured values (objects/arrays/scalars) rather than serialised strings. Null removes the entry.

written.description: True if the value was written successfully
